## Description

<!-- Provide a clear and thorough description of the changes in this pull request. Explain what was changed, why it was changed, and how it was changed. Reference the specification sections that motivated or governed the change. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] **Bug fix** — Non-functional defect corrected; no constitutional or architectural implications
- [ ] **New feature** — New capability, module, or interaction pattern added to the framework
- [ ] **Research addition** — New study, case study, or empirical evidence added to `/research/`
- [ ] **Specification clarification** — Improved wording, notation, or explanatory depth without changing semantics
- [ ] **Constitutional amendment** — Change to a guardrail, human-reserved domain, or foundational constraint (requires extraordinary review)

## Checklist

<!-- Before submitting, confirm each item. These are not optional — they reflect the constitutional commitments of the Algorapolis project. -->

- [ ] I have read the **CONTRIBUTORS.md** guidelines and my changes conform to them
- [ ] My changes align with the **Four Guardrails** of Algorapolis:
  1. No algorithm may override human democratic will
  2. All systems must preserve offline functionality
  3. No personal data may be used without explicit sovereign consent
  4. Emotional data may inform but never dictate governance decisions
- [ ] I have verified that no **Six Human-Reserved Domain** is violated by my changes:
  1. Moral judgment
  2. Cultural identity
  3. Spiritual belief
  4. Artistic expression
  5. Family structure
  6. Personal purpose
- [ ] I have added or updated relevant **documentation** (specification, README, inline comments)
- [ ] My changes are **grounded in the source specification** — I can point to the section that authorizes or motivates this change
- [ ] I have considered **African/Tanzanian context implications** — my changes do not impose cultural assumptions that are incompatible with African or Tanzanian realities, and where relevant, they actively strengthen contextual appropriateness

## Constitutional Impact Assessment
